title: Inttelligent
subTitle: A successful software engineer becomes a vigilante following the demise of his mentor in a bid to seek revenge against those responsible for the latter's death.

title: Ghudchadi
subTitle: A young couple's dream of marriage faces unexpected hurdles when their parents' shared past resurfaces, turning a love story into a tangled emotional ride.

title: Wagah
subTitle: An Indian soldier falls in love with a Muslim girl near the India-Pakistan border. However, when a riot breaks out in the area, the man finds his love and his life at risk.

title: Veera Sivaji
subTitle: Sivaji, a taxi driver, strives to raise money for the surgery of his niece. However, chaos ensues, when he gets deceived and strives to overcome the challenges.

title: Mr Joe B. Carvalho
subTitle: A private detective is tasked by a businessman to find his daughter. However, while investigating, he gets involved with his former girlfriend, a policewoman who is chasing an international criminal.

title: Vikram Hitlist
subTitle: A special agent investigates a murder committed by a masked group of serial killers. However, a tangled maze of clues soon leads him to the drug kingpin of Chennai.

title: Jawaan
subTitle: Azad fights against the systemic oppression of society. Soon, he finds himself in a web of deceit and crime as he teams up with a group of allies to take down a ruthless arms dealer.

title: Sangharsh Aur Vijay
subTitle: Badri is the protector of Badrinath temple. However, when a woman falls in love with him, his guru decides against making Badri his successor.

title: Meri Taqat Mera Faisla
subTitle: A young man follows in his father's footsteps by working for the welfare of the people living in his district. However, a corrupt politician threatens to thwart his plans.

title: Drishyam
subTitle: When the disappearance of a policewoman's son threatens to ruin Vijay's family, he leaves no stone unturned in order to shield his family.

title: Drishyam 2
subTitle: Georgekutty, a cinema hall owner, is a changed man who thrives in life. However, when his family become entangled in a criminal investigation, he must protect them from the legal institution.

title: Aavesham
subTitle: Three boys move into a hostel to pursue engineering, where they clash with seniors. To get revenge, they befriend a gangster.

title: Aavesham
subTitle: Three boys move into a hostel to pursue engineering, where they clash with seniors. To get revenge, they befriend a gangster.

title: Veeram
subTitle: A fearless young man vows to mend his violent ways after falling in love with a beautiful maiden. However, he is forced to resort to violence after a gang of nefarious criminals pursue his lady love.

title: Krishna Ka Badla
subTitle: A disillusioned actor, Babu, reluctantly joins a drama troupe for one last play. He teams up with journalist Meera and together they uncover a dangerous conspiracy that treatens them both.

title: Dove
subTitle: Anoop and Aditi love each other but face an unexpected obstacle when Anoop gets charged with murder. Meanwhile, Kumar and Sona, who share an intimate relationship, try to overcome their challenges.

title: Gollu Aur Pappu
subTitle: Two brothers, Gollu and Pappu, confront Gustaad Khan, a terrorist, for blowing up their garage. However, he decides to take advantage of their innocence by making them deploy a bomb in Ludhiana.

title: Gangs of Godavari
subTitle: An ambitious man named Lankala Rathnakar desires to rise to the top. However, to reach his goal, he must navigate through the murky waters of power and dirty politics.

title: Kotee
subTitle: In the corrupt city of Janatha, Kotee, an honest man, defies the ruthless criminal Dinoo Savarkar in a bid to secure a better future for his sister. However, his defiance leads to overwhelming debts.

title: King of Kotha
subTitle: Heartbroken on being back-stabbed by his childhood friend, Raju, an influential man, runs away from his hometown, Kotha. Soon, to bring back order in the town, a police officer plots a plan.

title: Mufti
subTitle: Gana, a police officer, must go undercover to find and kill Bhairathi Ranagal, a crime lord. However, when he realises that Bhairathi's intentions are good, he needs to decide his next step.

title: Dus Ka Dum
subTitle: A driving instructor is tasked to take Shakeela, a young woman, to a landlord in Mussoorie. But soon, he finds out that her life is in danger and decides to be her saviour.

title: Salaar Part 1: Ceasefire
subTitle: Just when the prince of Khansaar is about to rise to the throne, a plan of overthrowing him is exercised and only one man can help him retrieve power.

title: Dashing Jigarwala 2
subTitle: When the students of the Travancore Maharaja College start to form gangs and engage in crime and brutal fights, Edward Livingston, an English professor decides to restore order in the campus.

title: Dashing Jigarwala 2
subTitle: When the students of the Travancore Maharaja College start to form gangs and engage in crime and brutal fights, Edward Livingston, an English professor decides to restore order in the campus.

title: Meri Jaan
subTitle: A young man faces challenges and attempts to recover his debts. However, in the process, he also realises that he is in love with someone.

title: What the Fish
subTitle: Sudha hands over the responsibility of her house and pet fish to her niece's fiancé before leaving for a holiday. When she returns, all seems fine until she opens the bathroom door.

title: Chaalis Chauraasi
subTitle: Four friends hatch a scheme to steal money by impersonating the police. However, on their way, they run into a real inspector who enlists them to carry out an encounter.

title: Crazy Singh
subTitle: Bittu, a village simpleton, falls in love with a modern Saumya. Chaos ensues when their contrasting families meet to fix their marriage.

title: Ghudchadi
subTitle: A young couple's dream of marriage faces unexpected hurdles when their parents' shared past resurfaces, turning a love story into a tangled emotional ride.

title: Tantra
subTitle: Rekha, a woman with the ability to perceive spirits, sees her life take a dark turn when she encounters a sinister black magic practitioner.

title: Rudra Thandavam
subTitle: A police officer investigating a drug ring finds himself the subject of a smear campaign after he threatens to expose corruption.

title: Sanga Thamizhan
subTitle: Murugan, a happy-go-lucky young man, falls in love with the daughter of Sanjay, an industrialist. However, trouble arises when Sanjay notices that Murugan looks like a figure from his dark past.

title: Veera Simha Reddy
subTitle: Jai Simha Reddy, the son of the esteemed Veera Simha Reddy, returns home to avenge his father's death as a result of village politics.

title: Sundara Kanda
subTitle: A newly appointed professor finds that his student has a crush on him and wants to marry him. However, he ignores her advances and marries an orphan, but she continues to pursue him.

title: Ready
subTitle: A case of mistaken identities causes Prem and Sanjana to fall in love. Meanwhile, Sanjana's uncles try to get the money that she has inherited and Prem convinces them to marry her off to him.
